That can again inform the trade decisions that we look to make. So this is a pretty holistic overview of implied volatility in options trading. You now know hopefully a lot. And if you learned something, post what you learned in the comments below because I genuinely am interested. And I also want to see if I delivered on my promise, which is that you should learn something.
